Pomerdoge: THe Play-to-earn Pomer coin

Get involved with what publications are calling the biggest meme coin of the year. Pomerdoge - Presale selling out!

ENTER PRESALE Connect Wallet Buy Claim Rectification Connect Manually

What is $POMD, Pomerdoge?

$POMD, or The Pomerdoge token, as it’s sometimes called, is the in-game currency used in the Pomerdoge. By earning tokens, you can access NFTs, earn mouth-watering rewards and buy unique items from the Pomerdoge marketplace. $POMD is what feeds the Pomerdoge we like to call it Pomer food!

Buy Now

100% Secure & Audited

Contract Address

Ecosystem

Pomergame

Take part in the most exciting new P2E game while earning rewards. Be paid for your time playing the Pomergame.

Build up your character to elite level and create your own custom items for your avatar..

Once you have a gold status Pomer you will be able to start selling skins, items and other valuable  in the Pomerplace.

COMING SOON

Pomerplace

Pomerplace is where you will buy, sell and trade your valuable items that you collect in game.

The Pomerplace will consist of a marketplace and an arena where you can battle with your Pomerdoge against other members.

In the arena it’s a winner takes all situation so you have to be on your best form!

COMING SOON

NFTs

A collection of 7,777 NFT’s that will be released during the month of August / September.

Each NFT will cost 0.2 ETH each but we are keeping quiet on the benefits of owning an NFT until nearer the launch.

You will only be able to purchase an NFT if you own $POMD tokens.

    FAQs

    How can I buy $POMD?
    You can buy Pomerdoge tokens by signing in to our presale site where you can use a various number of different crypto currencies.
    Can I stake in the Pomerworld
    Absolutely you can, we have a fixed APR of 10%. VIP holders will be able to earn 15% on all staked $POMD tokens.
    What is Pomerdoge?
    Quite simply Pomerdoge aims to be the Pepe, Doge and Shiba killer all in one. A new P2P game that is fun to play and allows you to interact with other cryptoheads.
    When will the game be released?
    Pomerdoge will be available to play during Q4 of 2023. As its top secret information we aren’t stating the date but keep your eyes peeled
    When will I get my tokens I paid for?
    At the end of presale you will be able to claim your tokens using a simple button. You can claim these whenever you want in your own time.
    Is the smart contract audited?
    The smart contract has undergone two audits which have passed. You can view these by clicking on Solidproof or Cyberscope logo above.

    $150,000 worth of giveaways!!!

    By participating in the Pomerdoge presale you will be in with the chance to win rewards which will be paid out during the presale!

    We have weekly prizes that will be drawn in our telegram group.

    BUY NOW $50,000 GIVEAWAY

    Weekly Giveaways:

    Throughout the presale, alongside our $50,000 mega pomer prize we will give away $100,000 in giveaways.

    You can participate by entering the contests by either holding the $POMD token or by interacting in our Telegram and Twitter. All winners will be drawn on Telegram weekly.

    Roadmap

    View the roadmap for Pomerdoge to learn what we are building today, tomorrow and into the future.

    2023

    Phase One

    Phase One

    • Build and develop website
    • Smart contract audit
    • Presale goes live
    • Incorporate socials
    • Marketing active

    Phase Two

    Phase Two

    • Influencer marketing begins
    • NFT collection goes live
    • Pomergame development
    • Pomereducation begins

    Phase Three

    Phase Three

    • Uniswap launch
    • Staking active
    • Major CEX listings
    • Pomerplace live

    Phase Four

    Phase Four

    • VIP holders pomerdoge party
    • Pomerdoge merchandise website live
    • Bridge cross chain
    • List on top 3 CEX
